span.p:
Environment Checks
checkEnvironment
OS version gate,
spans-displays, mru-spaces

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Position Map
rebuildPositionMap
positionToUUID,
uuidToPosition,
getDisplayLabel

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Sync Group Lookup
getTargetsFor
getGroupKey
resolves trigger to targets

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Watcher
setupWatcher / stopWatcher
detects changed UUID,
guards on enabled +
syncInProgress

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sync Engine
syncTarget, syncNext
chained gotoSpace with
switchDelay, debounceTimer

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Name Store
loadSpaceNames,
saveSpaceNames,
ensureNamesLoaded,
nameForIndex
group-keyed schema

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Popup / Status HUD
buildPopupCanvas,
showPopup, hidePopup,
showStatusHUD

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Interactive Picker
startPicker, pickerNavigate,
pickerExecuteSwitch,
pickerDismiss
arrow-key event tap

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
state &+ popupState
enabled, syncInProgress,
lastActiveSpaces,
timers, canvas, eventtap
